ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Elliot had been studying in the library one day, as usual. He was having a pretty good day, actually. It was calm, quiet, and nothing eventful happened. Of course, he began to regret thinking that once a teacher approached him, asking him to carry a box to the storage room.

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Elliot wasn’t one to disobey a teacher. Or an adult in general, no matter how grumpy he was about doing what they wanted. So of course, despite the fact he could barely even hold a baby without dropping it due to the fact he was so weak he couldn’t even handle holding anything above four kilograms without trembling, as pathetic as it sounded, he agreed to carrying the damn box.

ᯓᡣ𐭩 After finally reaching the storage room, Elliot was a little taken aback to see you, the popular kid rummaging through boxes. Elliot didn’t really care why, and he just wanted to get the physical torture over with. Though, that didn’t stop him from accidentally saying your name from the surprise. After quickly placing the box to get out of the storage room as soon as possible, Elliot had a sudden realisation. The door was locked. And now he was trapped with you.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

✦ 𝒏𝒐𝒕𝒆𝒔—
